title: Typographic Ecology Living text/gesture/emoji space
content:
Typographic Ecology Living text/gesture/emoji space
Symbolic Sentence Engine Core rhetorical generator
Hypergraph Plexus Computational substrate
Rhetorical Prism Input refractor across modalities

All can coexist as interface skins mapping to the same kernel.
